description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the bank and branch search to find a retail banking branch of a specific conventional bank in Bur Dubai (Dubai) and copy that branch’s primary SWIFT/BIC code.

target_names: Emirates NBD - Bur Dubai Main Branch

tasks.instruction: On the fee comparison page, filter branches of a specific Islamic bank for outgoing international transfer fees in AED capped at 20 and save the branch with the lowest such fee to your favorites.

tasks.instruction: Use the IBAN validator to validate a specific UAE IBAN that belongs to a conventional bank, then from the validation result open that bank’s overview, select the first branch listed in Deira, and copy its main SWIFT/BIC code.

tasks.instruction: In the branch locator, filter for Deira branches that support USD international transfers, pick one branch from Emirates NBD and one from Mashreq Bank for comparison, then save the branch that shows the earlier USD transfer cut-off time.

tasks.instruction: On the guides page, find a guide tagged “IBAN basics” that focuses on how Dubai IBANs are structured with an estimated reading time of 10 minutes or less, then bookmark it to your reading list.
